case_title: JIMENES, SANTOS vs. MILLER, LANCE M.. AN INDIVIDUAL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIMENES, SANTOS AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, LANCE M., AN INDIVIDUAL AND DBA PASCHA POOL PRODUCTS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIMENES, SANTOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, LANCE M., AN INDIVIDUAL AND DBA PASCHA POOL PRODUCTS $2,844.74 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,927.74
